channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large London plane tree overhanging branches has caused considerable damage by blocking the gutters with leaves, seeds and twigs, has cost a lot of money to repair., 8th June
item.description:
10 Pittville Lawn, on road in front of 10 Pittville Lawn,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Pittville Mews, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Nailsworth Terrace along the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16a, Hereford Place, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post) problem, 8th June
item.description:
PERM Job made safe with barriers but a perm repair to be raised FAO to AHR. Sycamore Walk, Gloucester. EMER OOH Ringway Emergency - bollard on corner struck by vehicle lying at 10 degrees from horizontal lying across a tactile crossing DT25 BAA - crime number 207-40184-26-5353-NE04 -. (Enquiry 70015393) GLOUCESTER
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th June
item.description:
Fly tipping - more than 4 rubbish bags presented before collection day

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Hales Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Appalling damaged road surface., 8th June
item.description:
Appalling damaged road surface over an extended area and in many places. Cars constantly on the wrong side of the road, trying to avoid damage to their vehicles. This stretch of road needs urgent resurfacing. The area is along Prestbury High at the Southam Road roundabout end of the road, before you get to the shops.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, High Street, Noverton, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead deer middle of road, 8th June
item.description:
Very dead deer in road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass in children’s park, 8th June
item.description:
There is broken glass and rubbish on pathways in a children’s park next to the skate ramps

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bullfinch Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th June
item.description:
Yet more rubbish dumped here. Why does the council do absolutely nothing to catch those responsible for the constant stream of rubbish dumped in this location?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Pates Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small drain cover is broken, 7th June
item.description:
Drain outside No 2 Rhapsody Court has broken and is missing. Health and Safety issue - child has already had a close call with trapping an ankle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Symphony Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
